title: stelis regina
intro: Stelis regina, also known as the Queen Orchid, is a rare and exotic species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis regina include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of consuming Stelis regina extracts include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of Stelis regina can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues.
